message:
bd-1zpsd: Supervisor conformance suite (19 tests)

Test coverage for supervision strategies, restart policies, budget
exhaustion, backoff delays, spawn ordering, and builder validation.
Covers OneForOne/OneForAll/RestForOne isolation, monotone severity
cross-product, escalation without parent, window boundary conditions,
and dependency-ordered child start.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
